haiku45.summary_excerpt: Critical failures: (1) Actions not pinned to commit SHAs (actions/checkout@v4, oven-sh/setup-bun@v2) — will fail actionlint. (2) No test file exists; TDD requirement ('write failing test first') unmet. (3) Workflow doesn't run `bun test` or any tests through act; missing act-result.txt artifact. (4) No package.json to declare minimatch dependency. (5) No test fixtures/mocks. Script code itself is well-typed with good error handling (pr-label-assigner.ts lines 26-36, 69-77), but deliverable is ~4

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: The workflow and script are clean, modular, and well-typed. Workflow correctly uses least-privilege permissions and fallback variables. The TypeScript code is well factored with clear boundaries between business logic and the CLI entry point, making it highly readable and testable.
